waves.notes: All 3 tasks run truly in parallel. Each owns a different file. A1's parser test asserts properties of A2's workflow YAML, but both engineers write against the ADR's pinned literals (no file-level coordination needed).

tasks.title: Dockerfile + .dockerignore + tests/test_dockerfile.py
acceptance_criteria: Dockerfile written verbatim from ADR §'Dockerfile structure (annotated)'
.dockerignore written verbatim from ADR Decision 10
tests/test_dockerfile.py contains DockerfileTests, DockerignoreTests, WorkflowTests classes
Tests use stdlib only (unittest, re, pathlib, os) — no yaml, no subprocess, no docker
Repo-root discovery walks up from __file__ looking for pyproject.toml (FR-41)
All tests pass when run alongside A2's workflow YAML in a merged worktree
Test suite runs in < 1 second (NFR-14)
No edits to pipeline_status/*, pyproject.toml, or any existing test file

tasks.title: .github/workflows/docker-publish.yml
acceptance_criteria: Workflow YAML written verbatim from ADR §'GHA workflow shape (annotated)'
on: triggers include push (branches: [master], tags: ['v*']), pull_request, and workflow_dispatch
permissions block declares contents: read, packages: write
All uses: references pinned to @v3 or @v5 (no @latest anywhere)
Login step gated by if: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}
platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
push: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}
Image path ghcr.io/asnapper/master-replicator present
Tag matrix via docker/metadata-action@v5 produces :latest, :sha-<short>, :vX.Y.Z per ADR Decision 7
Build-args VERSION, REVISION, CREATED passed to Dockerfile
No additional files modified

tasks.title: README Docker section (anchored)
acceptance_criteria: New section appended to END of README.md (no edits to existing sections)
Section bracketed by HTML-comment anchors: <!-- BEGIN: docker-section (Feature A) --> and <!-- END: docker-section (Feature A) -->
Section content matches ADR §'Task A3 — README.md' verbatim
Contains Quick start, Subcommands, Tags, Colour output, Non-root user, Multi-architecture, Building locally subsections
References image path ghcr.io/asnapper/master-replicator and UID/GID 65532
No other file touched

cross_feature_notes.merge_contract: A3 uses anchor 'docker-section (Feature A)'; Feature B is expected to use a different anchor (e.g. 'helm-section'). Both sections append independently and 3-way-merge cleanly. Cross-feature merge order is the Orchestrator's responsibility, not these tasks'.
cross_feature_notes.shared_dependency_with_sibling: Feature B's Helm chart pins this image at ghcr.io/asnapper/master-replicator (NFR-16). No build-time coupling; the Helm chart can reference :latest, :sha-<short>, or :vX.Y.Z published by A2's workflow.
